claimText: The GST Council is a constitutional body established under Article 279A.
evidenceExcerpt: Established under Article 279A, the apex decision-making body on GST matters.
examUse: Statement-based question on the constitutional status of bodies.

claimText: The GST Council is chaired by the Union Finance Minister.
evidenceExcerpt: Composition: Chaired by the Union Finance Minister
examUse: Statement-based question on the composition of the GST Council.

claimText: In the GST Council, the Centre holds one-third of the voting weight, while the states collectively hold two-thirds.
evidenceExcerpt: Uses a weighted system; Centre has one-third vote, states have two-thirds
examUse: Statement-based question on voting rights distribution.

claimText: Decisions in the GST Council require a three-fourths majority of the weighted votes.
evidenceExcerpt: decisions need three-fourths majority of weighted votes.
